stereo_source_handling.rule: Stereo sources, especially loops and samples, must be deliberately placed in the depth field rather than left full-width by default.
options: Collapse to mono and place with panning plus reverb send
Narrow stereo image to 30-50% and assign to midground or background
Use mid-side EQ to reduce side energy below 500 Hz
Filter highs and lows if the element is felt rather than heard
Assign to background depth layer with heavy filtering if it is atmospheric
never: Leave a stereo loop at full width in the foreground
Let a stereo sample occupy the same width and depth as the vocal
Allow side-channel low-end buildup below 150-250 Hz

sample_loop_doctrine.rule: Imported loops and Splice samples should not be treated as finished mix elements by default. They must be re-contextualized into the song's depth, tone, groove, and emotional hierarchy.
preferred_moves: sidechain subtly to vocal or kick if needed
re-pitch or formant-shift if key/tone mismatches
replace with simpler one-shot if loop dominates
red_flags: loop contains its own reverb space that conflicts with song room
loop has mastered compression that makes live tracks feel small
loop repeats unchanged across multiple sections
